checks.msg: too counterintuitive — mechanics fight their fiction or aren't predictable from a card's name/flavor. Re-map so effect matches metaphor (legible, not generic).
the EXECUTED napkin economy model raised flag(s) — revise the design/numbers and re-record
too few interacting systems — add resource subsystems / transformations / sinks (complexity_target). Count only systems that interact, not isolated resources.
vocabulary too self-contained — at least half the primitives must operate on shared/persistent state or other effects (triggers, conditionals, references) so cards can combo.
the EXECUTED napkin economy model raised flag(s) — revise the design/numbers and re-record
the EXECUTED napkin economy model raised flag(s) — revise the design/numbers and re-record
archetypes too flat — each needs >=3 interacting cards that chain into a payoff, not a pile of independent good cards.
the EXECUTED napkin economy model raised flag(s) — revise the design/numbers and re-record
too few meaningful decisions per turn — raise agency (plays/turn, branching, real choices), per the napkin's median branching estimate.
the EXECUTED napkin economy model raised flag(s) — revise the design/numbers and re-record
starter pool too flat — at least half the cards must participate in a combo/synergy, not stand alone.

complete_msg: All design layers locked. The GDD + effect vocabulary + starter pool are ready to seed game-loop.

upstream.hint: run world-architect first — designing from generic fantasy is the failure mode this pipeline exists to avoid
world-architect L7 emits the ludic-hook ledger as data (the element→mechanic table); regenerate it from WORLD.md's ledger section if missing

any: planning/GDD.md — this layer's section and every downstream layer's section
src/content/cards/ + src/content/contracts/ (data compiled from the GDD)
the game-loop stage — its engine/bots/rubric consume the GDD and vocabulary

init_hint: Edit design/config.json to tune the layer plan, gates, and the napkin check.
record_hint: run the layer's diverge→critique→(napkin)→synthesize micro-loop, then `record` it
